name: Buffet's Gourmet Ω
ability: On your 1st four nights, choose a character type (different from previous nights): you learn five characters of that type which are not in play.
flavor: Oh no, those flavours couldn't possibly go together. Pass.

name: Hero Ω
ability: The 2nd good player executed doesn't die & can't die tonight.
flavor: A hero always arrives just in the nick of ti... Oh wait one died already.

firstNightReminder: They choose a character. Tell them if it's in play.
otherNightReminder: They choose a character. Tell them if it's in play.
name: Suitor Ω
ability: Each night, choose a character: learn if it is in play. The 2nd time you would learn a yes, you learn no, & stop waking.
flavor: THIS IS THE HAPPIEST DAY OF MY LIFE!

firstNightReminder: They learn how many Outsiders are alive.
otherNightReminder: They learn how many Outsiders are alive.
name: Racketeer Ω
ability: Each night, you learn how many Outsiders are alive. Your 2 non-Traveller neighbours might register as evil & as Outsiders.

name: Dullahan Ω
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. You & 1 Townsfolk neighbor register as a character of the opposite alignment to Townsfolk abilities.
flavor: It is too late now. Death is coming and they are blind. You may know everything, but they will never believe you.

firstNightReminder: Every other night, they choose 3 players. Kill the first 2 sometime in the next 2 nights & the last one sometime in the next 2 days.
otherNightReminder: Every other night, they choose 3 players. Kill the first 2 sometime in the next 2 nights & the last one sometime in the next 2 days.
name: Sin of Gluttony Ω
ability: Each other night, choose three players: the first two will die at any time within the next two nights & the third might die at any time during the next two days.
flavor: You all look so tasty, it would be a shame to let you go to waste...
